hippocampus_threshold.name: Hippocampus trigger threshold
hippocampus_threshold.hint: Number of accumulated user/assistant chunks per session that trigger a background hippocampus run (fact extraction, deduplication, reflection, profile update). Lower = more responsive memory but more LLM calls.

zh.name: 海马体触发阈值
zh.hint: 每个会话累计多少条 user/assistant 对话块时触发一次后台海马体运行（提取事实、去重、反思、更新画像）。值越低记忆越实时但 LLM 调用越多。

recall_top_k.name: Recall top-K
recall_top_k.hint: How many long-term memories to recall and inject into the system prompt each turn.

zh.name: 召回条数 K
zh.hint: 每轮对话从长期记忆里召回多少条注入到 system prompt。

max_memory_length.name: Short-term memory window
max_memory_length.hint: Sliding-window size for short-term chat history (chunks per session).

zh.name: 短期记忆窗口
zh.hint: 短期对话历史的滑动窗口大小（每会话保留多少对话块）。

inject_profile.name: Inject user profile
inject_profile.hint: Inject the per-user profile (name, traits, preferences, relationships, facts) into the system prompt every turn.

zh.name: 注入用户画像
zh.hint: 每轮对话把当前用户的画像（名字、特征、偏好、关系、事实）注入到 system prompt。

inject_facts.name: Inject recalled facts
inject_facts.hint: Include recalled fact memories in the system prompt every turn.

zh.name: 注入召回的事实
zh.hint: 每轮对话把召回的事实类记忆注入到 system prompt。

inject_reflections.name: Inject recalled reflections
inject_reflections.hint: Include recalled high-level reflections in the system prompt every turn.

zh.name: 注入召回的洞察
zh.hint: 每轮对话把召回的高层洞察（reflection）注入到 system prompt。

enable_decay.name: Enable forgetting (decay)
enable_decay.hint: Periodically downgrade and archive low-importance, long-unused memories. (Decay runs on demand via run_forgetting_cycle; scheduling will be added in a later release.)

zh.name: 启用遗忘（衰减）
zh.hint: 周期性降级并归档低重要度、长期未访问的记忆。（当前需手动调用 run_forgetting_cycle 触发，后续版本会加自动调度。）

auto_migrate_legacy_db.name: Auto-migrate v2 SQLite
auto_migrate_legacy_db.hint: On first run, automatically migrate any existing v2 kiraos.db (user_profiles + event_logs) into the new TOML structure. The old file is backed up to kiraos.db.bak_<timestamp>.

zh.name: 自动迁移 v2 SQLite
zh.hint: 首次启动时自动把已存在的 v2 kiraos.db（user_profiles + event_logs 两张表）迁移到新的 TOML 结构。旧文件会备份为 kiraos.db.bak_<时间戳>。

skills_dir.name: Skills directory
skills_dir.hint: Path to the skills directory (defaults to data/skills/). Each skill is a subfolder containing either SKILL.md (recommended, single-file YAML frontmatter) or the legacy manifest.json + instruction.md pair.

zh.name: 技能目录
zh.hint: 技能目录的路径（默认 data/skills/）。每个技能是一个子目录，可以用 SKILL.md（推荐，YAML frontmatter 单文件）或者老格式的 manifest.json + instruction.md 两文件。

disabled_skills.name: Disabled skills
disabled_skills.hint: List of skill names to disable (won't be registered as LLM tools). Example: ["tarot_reading", "daily_fortune"]

zh.name: 禁用的技能
zh.hint: 要禁用的技能名列表（不会注册为 LLM 工具）。例如：["tarot_reading", "daily_fortune"]

enable_slash_commands.name: Enable slash commands
enable_slash_commands.hint: Allow users to trigger skills via /command (e.g. /tarot). When disabled, skills can only be triggered by LLM.

zh.name: 启用斜杠命令
zh.hint: 允许用户用 /命令 直接触发技能（如 /tarot）。关闭时技能只能由 LLM 调用。

webui_port.name: Memory WebUI port
webui_port.hint: Port for the memory management WebUI (0 = disabled, valid range: 1-65535). Example: 8765

zh.name: 记忆 WebUI 端口
zh.hint: 记忆管理 WebUI 的监听端口（0 = 禁用，有效范围 1-65535）。例如：8765

webui_host.name: Memory WebUI host
webui_host.hint: Bind address for the memory WebUI. Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access.

zh.name: 记忆 WebUI 绑定地址
zh.hint: 记忆 WebUI 的监听地址。127.0.0.1 表示仅本机可访问。

webui_token.name: Memory WebUI token
webui_token.hint: Access token for the memory WebUI (leave empty for no authentication, only safe for local access).

zh.name: 记忆 WebUI 访问令牌
zh.hint: 记忆 WebUI 的访问令牌（留空表示不鉴权，仅在仅本机访问时安全）。
